CustomField.description:
SR: Sometimes you want a days offset of 0 but you don't want the SMS to trigger to quickly. So works in conjunction with Days Offset to add x minutes to the time.
Setting the TIME value overrides this setting though.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
SR: Sometimes you want a days offset of 0 but you don't want the SMS to trigger to quickly. So works in conjunction with Days Offset to add x minutes to the time.
Setting the TIME value overrides this setting though.
CustomField.label: Minutes Offset
